creator.name: Kirsten Korosec, Sean O'Kane, Theresa Loconsolo

title: Did you know you can’t steal a charity? Don’t worry. Elon Musk will remind you.
body_text: Elon Musk spent the better part of three days on the witness stand this week in his lawsuit against OpenAI, and it’s already getting messy. Emails, texts, and his own tweets are surfacing in court, and there are plenty more witnesses to come. Musk’s argument against OpenAI? By converting the company to a for-profit model, Sam Altman betrayed the “nonprofit for the […]
